---
title: "Impressum"
---

Information in accordance with §5 TMG and §18 MStV (Federal Republic of Germany).

## Responsible party

<!-- TODO_IMPRESSUM: name of responsible party -->
**Name:** TODO_IMPRESSUM

<!-- TODO_IMPRESSUM: postal address -->
**Postal address:**
TODO_IMPRESSUM

<!-- TODO_IMPRESSUM: email -->
**Email:** TODO_IMPRESSUM

<!-- TODO_IMPRESSUM: ORCID -->
**ORCID:** TODO_IMPRESSUM

<!-- TODO_IMPRESSUM: institutional affiliation if applicable -->
**Affiliation:** TODO_IMPRESSUM

## Editorial responsibility

The party named above is responsible for the editorial content of this site under §18 (2) MStV.

## Jurisdiction

This site is operated under the law of the Federal Republic of Germany. Disputes are subject to German jurisdiction.

## EU online dispute resolution

The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): <https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr>. We are not obliged and not willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
